feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Unable to Reverse Bill of Exchange Special G/L Document in F 20 – Error F5345
entry.content:
We are facing an issue while reversing a Bill of Exchange Special G/L transaction using T‑code F‑20. When we enter the correct Key Date (same as the due date), the system returns the following error:

Error Message: No due item exists at the key date (Message no. F5345)

Issue Details:

  • Transaction Type: Bill of Exchange – Special G/L
  • Reversal T‑code: F‑20
  • Key Date entered: Correct due date
  • System still shows error F5345
  • Other Special G/L transactions are reversing successfully
  • OB86 period is maintained as Period 5
  • Please find the attached error details document

entry.title: From where the payment method is getting fetched in sales order line item?
entry.content: I need to understand from where the payment method is getting fetched in sales order line item, as customer master data is having 'blank' payment method but still somehow in sales order line-item payment method 'direct debit' is getting picked automatically. I need to know which configuration is bringing this. because of this the invoice is getting created with 'direct debit' payment method & payment is also happening with 'direct debit' method, which doesn't need. Hence, I need to rectify the config and correct asap.

entry.title: Excel Reporting
entry.content:
Hello professionals!

If you could have one pre-built Excel dashboard automatically populated from any SAP report, which report would you choose?

What do you wish that report could tell you automatically?

entry.title: Anlagengitter mit einzeiliger Darstellung notwendig
entry.content:
Es fehlt die Funtkon, das Anlagengitter S_ALR_87011990 einzeilig darzustellen.

Die Gitterversion bietet nicht so viele Spalten.

entry.title: MRP indicator (1 or 2) for more than 1 scheduling agreement for same material & vendor combination
entry.content:
it is possible set MRP relevance indicator(1 or 2) for more than 1 scheduling agreement for same material and vendor combination.

Also want to know,if MRP area can be used to meet requirements. 

We have been looking for a solution for the last 1 month .

entry.title: New Components adding in existing BOM
entry.content:
We have approximately 500 BOMs, and the component sequences are not consistent across these BOMs. We need to add one new component to all BOMs in mass.

Could please provide a solution.

entry.title: Wrong Volume Calculation in Delivery
entry.content: Wrong Volume is getting calculated in Delivery Header in SAP. It is getting calculated correctly at item level. Packing also happening in this case. What could be the reason for wrong Volume Calculation at header level? This is happening only for 1 material and the stacking factor is changed from 1 to 3 in recent changes. Is that the reason? Or Do I need to check any config related to packing? Please advise.

entry.title: Decimals are not not displayed in WBS element field in standard report
entry.content: Decimals are not not displayed in WBS element field in standard report

entry.title: Error in MD03 MRP run "in house production time is high" error
entry.content:
in MD03 i am getting in house production time is high error. this i due to configuration of Work scheduling view. when processing time is greater then base quantity that time i get this error, but for other material even if processing time is high then base quantity we don't get error. so what can be the reason for getting this error what configuration setting i should check.

 

  • Material – 0022840001 and plant 1173

     

  • Case 1 =Material = 021475-000 and plant 1306
  • Case 2=Material =0022840001 and plant 1173

  • Issue= for case 2 material we are getting in house production time is high error in MD03

  •  



  • Case 2= if we put processing time high then base quantity in work scheduling view then we get in house production time error in MD03
  • Case 1= if we put processing time high then base quantity in work scheduling view then  also we don’t  get in house production time error in MD03


Requirement= we want to know what parameter should be check to identify what is causing erroring case 2

entry.title: Selection fields in the SAP query are not displayed
entry.content:
Hello OSS Team,

When creating a new query from a copy of a standard query, not all selection fields are displayed, even though they are copied from the original query.

We checked support notes 2101098, 2362425, and 2554642. These are no longer relevant, as our C11 system is already on SP 28. Support note 2601579 also did not provide a solution.

Thanks for the support

With kind regards

Josef Walter

entry.title: Wrong due date calculation
entry.content:
Dear Sir / Madam.

We have created new payment terms as per business requirement.

However, SAP is calculating wrong due date.

Please refer to the document attached which contains the screenshots which explains the same.

 

Warm regards,

Punam

entry.title: FOREIGN TRADE DATA: Function code cannot be selected
entry.content:
Hello,

Good day!

We encountered an error in the Foreign Trade Data item. When navigating through each description in the Incompleteness Analysis, we received the error “Function code cannot be selected” and the fields were disabled. 

The invoice in error is a cancellation invoice.

Could you please assist with the possible solution?

Please check the attached screenshot for reference.

Thank you!

entry.title: Transfer standard field from erp delivery to ewm delivery
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have a requirement to transfer the Unloading Point (ABLAD) from ERP to EWM for outbound deliveries.

  • Source: RESB-ABLAD
  • In ERP delivery, the field is available at header level (LIKP-ABLAD), but not found at item level (LIPS)
  • Requirement: make this information available per item in EWM
  • working on s/4 Hana 2023

Current approach:

  • Extension via EEW (item level)
  • Mapping via BAdI /SCWM/EX_ERP_MAPIN_OD_SAVEREPL (MAPIN)

Questions:

  • Is this the correct BAdI for this scenario in embedded EWM?
  • How would you handle the mapping per item, given that ABLAD is not available in LIPS?
  • Do we need an ERP enhancement to pass it at item level?

thanks for support

entry.title: using BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE to perform a 102 reversal
entry.content: When using BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE to perform a 102 reversal, the input parameters REF_DOC_YR, REF_DOC, and REF_DOC_IT are provided in BAPI2017_GM_ITEM_CREATE. However, in the generated material document, the fields SJAHR, SMBLN, and SMBLP are blank when checked in MSEG Question: Besides providing the values for REF_DOC_YR, REF_DOC, and REF_DOC_IT in GOODSMVT_ITEM, which additional field in GOODSMVT_ITEM must be filled so that SJAHR, SMBLN, and SMBLP can also be generated?

entry.title: neuer Bewertungsbereich für Versicherungswerte
entry.content:
Guten Tag, können Sie mir bitte helfen zu verstehen, wie der neue Bewertungsbereich für Versicherungswerte angelegt werden muss?

Ich habe jetzt mit allen hier zur Verfügung stehenden Informationen einen Bewertungsbereich erstellt. Dieser bringt den Fehler E006 obwohl ich einen Anlage ohne Wert habe.

Zudem ist mir unklar, wie ich die Versicherungswerte dann von 'migriere' in den neuen Bereich hinein?

Ebenfalls würde ich gerne den Index je Anlagenklasse vorgeben aber das Feld in Transaktion OAYZ ist ausgegraut. 

Gibt es irgendwo eine vernünftige Anleitung?

Vielen Dank im Voraus

S. Horsch

entry.title: im ERM wird die EKG in den Banf-Belegen nicht richtig angezeigt
entry.content:
In der Übersicht unter Banfen gesamt wird bzw. sollte in der Detailsicht in der Spalte EkGrpBeleg die Einkäufergruppe, die in der Banf eingetragen ist angezeigt. Es gibt aber Einträge, bei denen die Einkäufergruppe nicht richtig aus den Belegen ausgelesen wird.

Siehe Word-Anhang

entry.title: Correction of header data without changing item details for Poland credit memo
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there a standard credit‑memo document type in Poland that permits corrections to header‑level data without altering the line‑item details, specifically for the purpose of addressing formal errors?

This clarification is required for our Poland implementation ticket, as we need to ensure compliance with local legal and accounting requirements while avoiding unnecessary changes to item‑level data.

Thank you in advance for your support.

Regards,
Yoshinee Mootheeveeren

entry.title: unable to locate the path where billing plan type 03 is mainained from the attched screen
entry.content:
unable  to locate the path where billing plan type 03 is maintained from  the attached screen .

Kindly share the path 

i was unable to find in below 2 paths

IMG > Sales and Distribution > Billing > Payment Cards > Maintain Payment Card Plan Types.

IMG > Sales and Distribution > Billing > Billing plan  > Define billing plan .

entry.title: Howdo we handle Q stock posting through QM management in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like SAP’s guidance on how to manage the following business scenario in S/4HANA.

We are required to implement a rolling quarantine process.

The business requirement is to Keep materials under Quality Management control, Prevent any SD customer delivery until a final Usage Decision (UD) is taken, While still allowing certain logistics movements (internal or third-party stock transfers)  before the end of the QM process. 

In an ECC6 environment, the Q stock status represents a strong logistical lock, preventing any use or transfer of the stock until quality release is completed.

The purpose is to analyze the possibilities offered by S/4HANA QM standard or controlled Q’ process designs” to address a specific business requirement (strong business constraints (ultra-fresh products, very short expiration dates, and high operational impact), , while maintaining strict quality governance.

Business Requirement Description<

entry.title: Flexible workflow for sales documents multiple currencies
entry.content:
Hello!

How is it possible to have multi-currencies in the Flexible workflow for Sales Credit notes?

For example: We have a credit note order with currency in JPY but the workflow rule is set up in EUR.

Should it be done as code in a BAPI? If so, please explain. Something similar of 2990437 - Flexible workflow: Incorrect currency conversion of item value in purchase requisition during the approval - SAP for Me 

Kind Regards,

Leonardo Delgado
